data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Identity handoff audit trail', but there is no evidence provided that confirms such a trail exists or is being tracked within the system. The linked use case explicitly states the need for an identity handoff audit trail, yet the prior steps do not indicate any checks or records that would demonstrate the existence of this audit trail. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the requirement, as evidenced by the lack of relevant data in the prior steps.
gaps: No evidence of an identity handoff audit trail being created or tracked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for identity handoff audit trail
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that an identity handoff audit trail is being recorded and accessible.
